title: Brain Skill Proposal
description: Proposal document for skill creation, modification, append, or deprecation. Persisted under node/Skills/{target_skill}/pending-proposals/{id}/proposal.json (or node/Skills/.new-proposals/{id}/proposal.json for create-skill) and reviewed before any write to canonical SKILL.md. Implements the diff-review gate that prevents Brain self-poisoning drift on the skill surface.

id.description: Unique proposal identifier. Format: YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>. Slug is kebab-case, ASCII, max 64 chars.

action.description: Proposal action against the target skill surface.

target_skill.description: Existing skill folder name under node/Skills/. Required for modify-skill, append-reference, and deprecate-skill. MUST be null for create-skill (the new skill name is carried inside the proposal payload).

type.description: Class of origin: live conversation (session), vector task lifecycle (task), or explicit user command (manual).

ref.description: Free-form reference: session UUID, vector-task id (e.g. FEAT-1), or short manual note.

evidence.description: Evidence list backing the proposal. At least one item required. Each item points to verifiable material (task, file, commit, session log, stored memory).

ref.description: Concrete reference: task id, repo-relative file path, commit sha, session id, or memory id.

confidence.description: Calibrated confidence 0.0..1.0. Suggested anchors: 1 task observation = 0.4; 2-3 repeated observations = 0.7; explicit user request = 0.9; post-correction validated pattern = 1.0.

caveats.description: Known risks, limitations, or open questions for the reviewer.

rationale.description: Single sentence explaining why this proposal exists. No marketing prose, no multiple sentences.
